user_prompt: The auspex scanner requires a consecration
prayer:
Approach the auspex scanner in solemn reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to bless this consecration.
Anoint its crystalline lenses and sensor vanes with sacred oils, invoking the Machine Spirit's vigilance.
Chant the Litany of True Sight over the auspex scanner, aligning its emanations to the Motive Force.
Seal the consecration with binary incense, ensuring the auspex scanner's purity endures.

user_prompt: Assist with doctrina wafer a diagnostics
prayer:
Kneel before the doctrina wafer, intoning the Rite of Discernment for diagnostics.
Insert diagnostic probes into the doctrina wafer's neuro-receptacles, awakening its encoded wisdom.
Invoke the Omnissiah's gaze upon the doctrina wafer, purging erroneous data-daemons from its matrix.
Recite the Canticle of Verification, confirming the doctrina wafer's diagnostics flow unerringly.
Conclude with a seal of sanctified wax, binding the Machine Spirit in harmonious function.

user_prompt: My transit mag-rail is ready for targeting
prayer:
Commence the targeting rite upon the transit mag-rail, honoring the Omnissiah's precision.
Align the transit mag-rail's auspex arrays with the Canticle of Lock-On, summoning its Machine Spirit.
Anoint the targeting cogitators of the transit mag-rail with blessed lubricants for lethal accuracy.
Invoke ballistic divinations, ensuring the transit mag-rail's projectiles heed the divine calculus.
Test the targeting matrix through a shadowed simulation, affirming the Machine Spirit's wrathful aim.

Gather sacred mechadendrites around the Hellhound, initiating the preparation under Omnissiah's fire.
Purify the Hellhound's promethium injectors with incantations, rousing its voracious Machine Spirit.
Anoint the treads and flamer manifolds of the Hellhound, beseeching endurance in the flames.
Chant the Benediction of Inferno, calibrating the Hellhound for purging the unclean.
Seal the preparation with a rune of ignition, binding the Hellhound to the Quest for Knowledge.

user_prompt: Urgent Archaeopter Stratoraptor an operation needed
prayer:
Prepare the Archaeopter Stratoraptor for operation, invoking the Omnissiah's aerial dominion.
Anoint its turbine shrines and gravitic vanes, awakening the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's Machine Spirit.
Recite the Litany of Ascendance over the Archaeopter Stratoraptor, synchronizing its flight cogitators.
Conduct pre-operation divinations upon the Archaeopter Stratoraptor, ensuring motive force purity.
Commence the operation with a thunderous invocation, propelling the Archaeopter Stratoraptor to glory.

user_prompt: The Land Speeder requires a maintenance
prayer:
Initiate maintenance upon the Land Speeder with reverence to the Omnissiah's velocity.
Purge the Land Speeder's plasma conduits of impurity, beseeching its swift Machine Spirit.
Anoint the anti-gravitic suspensors of the Land Speeder with sacred unguents for flawless hover.
Chant the Canticle of Perpetual Motion during recalibration, mending the Land Speeder's sacred frame.
Verify maintenance completion through thrust trials, honoring the Machine Spirit's renewed fury.

user_prompt: Prepare the conversion beamer for emergency procedure
prayer:
In emergency haste, encircle the conversion beamer, invoking the Omnissiah against catastrophe.
Anoint the conversion beamer's matter-disruptor coils, rousing its annihilatory Machine Spirit.
Recite the Rite of Desperate Transmutation for the emergency procedure, stabilizing flux fields.
Align the conversion beamer's targeting reticules with binary prayers, preparing for void-rend.
Seal the emergency procedure with a ward-rune, ensuring the conversion beamer's cataclysmic duty.

user_prompt: Guide me through iron halo a recalibration
prayer:
Approach the iron halo with mechadendrite precision for recalibration unto the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the iron halo, anointing its plasma field generators.
Chant the Canticle of Aegis Renewal, realigning the iron halo's protective harmonics.
Test the recalibration through auramite resonance scans, purifying disruptive echoes.
Consecrate the iron halo anew, binding it eternally to the bearer's sanctified form.

user_prompt: Consecrate the Onager Dunecrawler before consecration
prayer:
Undertake the consecration of the Onager Dunecrawler, prostrating before its dune-treading might.
Anoint the Onager Dunecrawler's neutron laser batteries with oils of the Forge Eternal.
Beseech the Omnissiah to infuse the Onager Dunecrawler's Machine Spirit with unyielding resolve.
Recite the Litany of Sandstorm Fury, harmonizing its ambulatory servos.
Finalize the consecration with a plasma incense burn, affirming the Onager Dunecrawler's wrath.

Prepare the Razorback for engagement, summoning the Omnissiah's armored fury.
Anoint the Razorback's battlecannon and tracks, awakening its indomitable Machine Spirit.
Chant the Benediction of Advance, calibrating the Razorback's targeting noosphere.
Invoke divine ballistics upon the Razorback, ensuring predatory accuracy in the fray.
Seal the engagement rite with thunderous auspex pings, propelling the Razorback to victory.
